## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Dimmo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, product updates, and growth initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 12 articles + 3 calibration articles ready, aiming for 15 total by Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [New product page UI template nearly ready for rollout, with discussions on content presentation and customization](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Focus on sales-related content and subcategories (e.g., cold calling, cold emailing) for immediate growth](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Site traffic showing consistent daily clicks (6-10), indicating positive growth trajectory](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [12 articles + 3 calibration articles ready for publication](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Targeting 15 articles total by Thursday/Friday](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)
  - [Writer cross-verifying companies with newly received list](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Current process: keyword research → top 10 results → filter companies → check Dimmo listing](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

### Content Strategy Expansion

  - [Exploring creative ways to target salespeople (e.g., sales conferences, guides)](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Diversifying content beyond software listings to improve overall ranking](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Considering guides to support software articles (e.g., "How to improve sales funnel")](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Troy to send trendy topics (e.g., email deliverability) by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### New Product Page UI

  - [Nearly ready for rollout, pending final testing](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Includes AI-generated fields from summary pages](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Discussions on condensing information to avoid excessive scrolling](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [Potential for companies to edit fields for accuracy and uniqueness](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Launch strategy: release current version, then iterate based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1416.0)

### SEO and Traffic Update

  - [Achieving 6-10 daily clicks consistently](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Caution advised when updating content to avoid traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [No changes planned for URL structures or meta titles/descriptions](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)

### Team Updates

  - [New account director joining, with expertise in G2's program](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Will provide strategic insights and special focus on G2 integration](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1685.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to review product page UI links and provide suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

  - [Lucas to finalize and roll out new product page UI](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=764.0)
  - [Jimmy to introduce new account director with G2 expertise to the team](https://fathom.video/share/Sd-4r9sz32eCnVdkyH3Es2EYBYtfw5ht?tab=summary&timestamp=1689.0)
